result.stderr:
RobJan.Minecraft.ChunkRemover 1.1.2
Copyright (C) 2026 RobJan.Minecraft.ChunkRemover

  -w, --world          (Default: .) Path to the world folder.

  -r, --range          (Default: 32) Range (in chunks) from any specified
                       coordinates where no data will be removed.

  -c, --coordinates    Required. List of coordinates to not remove any chunks
                       around within the range.Format `x,z`. Optinally the
                       reange can be overriden for each coordinate by using the
                       format `x,z,r` where `r` is the range.

  --help               Display this help screen.

  --version            Display version information.
